pages.title: Room Audio Needs Review
pages.kicker: A transcript is only as reliable as capture, attribution, consent, and correction.

cards.title: Microphone placement
cards.body: Distance, reverberation, overlap, and HVAC noise shape recognition quality.

cards.title: Speaker attribution
cards.body: Diarization labels remain provisional until participants or reviewers confirm them.

cards.title: Consent boundary
cards.body: The product must make recording state and retention understandable.

cards.title: Human correction
cards.body: Names, decisions, and action items need an editable source-backed record.
